name: codex-knowledge-llm
description: Turn source material into an Obsidian-ready knowledge vault with Codex workflows, reusable notes, and daily summaries.

interface.shortDescription: Convert anything into an Obsidian knowledge vault.
interface.longDescription: Codex Knowledge LLM bundles a Codex skill and vault kit for ingesting articles, X posts, YouTube transcripts, book notes, PDFs-as-text, Readwise exports, Kindle notes, and automation captures into a structured Obsidian knowledge system.
defaultPrompt: Turn this source into Obsidian notes.
Embed the vault kit into this folder.
